phase_a_summary.headline_finding: Categorical bridge between operator-algebraic Latrémolière 2512.03573 metametric and synthetic-Lorentzian Mondino-Sämann 2504.10380 pre-length space, via R3 Connes-Rovelli thermal-time identification. The bridge is functorial (not isometric); Đ^K measures thermal time, ℓ^L measures geometric proper time, both are images of the same wedge KMS state under different projection mechanisms.

phase_B_sequencing.estimated_effort: 1.5 months at standard math.OA paper cadence (Papers 42, 45 ~1.5 months each)
phase_B_sequencing.rationale: Papers 42/43/45/46 each consolidated multiple sub-sprints into single math.OA standalone at ~1.5-2 months drafting effort. Paper 48 is structurally analogous (5 sub-sprints + 1 application sprint → 1 standalone). Math.OA convention is single-paper consolidation of sprint arcs.
phase_B_sequencing.alternative_if_PI_wants_compression: staged delivery: §3+§4 first (Krein-lift + hypertopology), then §5 (bridge), then §6+§7 (application + compactness), then §1+§2+§8 (introduction + setup + open questions)

methodological_note.compression_mechanism: Phase A.4'-A G-B2 closure (originally estimated 3-5 weeks) collapsed to single session via structural finding that off-orbit super-additivity is structurally vacuous at K⁺-weak-form bridge level. Phase A.2' Def 1.26 caveat (originally estimated 2-3 weeks) resolved via Latrémolière Lemma 1.25. Phase A.4'-B G-B4 closure (originally 1-2 weeks) closed in single session via Plancherel-nesting structural identification.
methodological_note.realized_vs_estimated_effort: Tier 3-Light estimated 6-7 months end-to-end; Phase A formal-memo arc compressed Phases A.2' + A.3' + A.4'-A + A.4'-B + A.4'-C into single day at formal-memo level. Remaining Phase B is ~1.5 months at standard math.OA cadence.

most_surprising_finding_during_synthesis.finding: Strong-form Q1' (Paper 46 enlarged substrate) is structurally distinct from K⁺-weak-form Q1 because the M-diagonal topography of the K⁺-weak-form bridge makes off-orbit super-additivity STRUCTURALLY VACUOUS (Decomposition O Case (iii) empty). This means the same Bridge Theorem 6.4 has two qualitatively different closures: K⁺-weak-form closes via trivial vacuity (no super-additivity content needed), strong-form requires substantive operator-algebraic super-additivity (via Paper 42 four-witness transport to off-axis modular flow). The 'difficulty' of the bridge proof is concentrated entirely on the enlarged-substrate side.
most_surprising_finding_during_synthesis.implication: Q1' is a genuine multi-month NCG-mathematics target with substantive new content (off-axis super-additivity proof), not merely a routine extension. Defers cleanly as Paper 48 §8 open question and Sprint L3e-Q1' candidate.
